metadata.name: PHOENIX persistent thermal sources — Sicily
metadata.description: Coordinates that consistently appear as 'fires' to overhead satellite sensors (SEVIRI, FCI, MODIS, VIIRS) but are NOT wildfires. Sources are volcanic, industrial (refineries, petrochemical, ports), or persistent natural anomalies. Published as a public good for civil-protection, researchers, and Sicilians who want to interpret FIRMS / EUMETSAT maps correctly.
metadata.methodology_summary: Static seed from INGV-HOTSAT volcanic knowledge + Round-2 council research on Sicilian industrial sites. Auto-enrichment via OpenStreetMap Overpass. Mining of additional candidates from PHOENIX internal_fires history (cells firing >=6x in 12h windows without VIIRS confirmation).

sources.notes_it: Vulcano attivo. Le anomalie termiche sono dovute all'attività effusiva e fumarolica. Monitorato in continuo da INGV-HOTSAT.
sources.notes_en: Active volcano. Thermal anomalies driven by effusive and fumarolic activity. Continuously monitored by INGV-HOTSAT.

sources.notes_it: Vulcano in attività continua. Esplosioni stromboliane permanenti.
sources.notes_en: Continuously active volcano. Permanent Strombolian explosions.

sources.notes_it: Campo fumarolico attivo. Anomalie termiche da emissioni di gas vulcanici.
sources.notes_en: Active fumarolic field. Thermal anomalies from volcanic gas emissions.

sources.notes_it: Il più grande complesso petrolchimico d'Europa. Le torce di emergenza producono segnale termico permanente in MIR.
sources.notes_en: Europe's largest petrochemical complex. Emergency gas flares produce a permanent MIR thermal signature.

vision_result.notes: Large petrochemical and industrial port complex visible on left side of harbor with extensive storage tank farms (circular white tanks), industrial facilities, and port infrastructure. Multiple industrial zones around natural harbor with ships anchored. Dense urban development on right side. This is the Augusta harbor area in Sicily, known for major oil refining and petrochemical operations.

annotation.auto_notes: Large petrochemical and industrial port complex visible on left side of harbor with extensive storage tank farms (circular white tanks), industrial facilities, and port infrastructure. Multiple industrial zones around natural harbor with ships anchored. Dense urban development on right side. This is the Augusta harbor area in Sicily, known for major oil refining and petrochemical operations.

sources.notes_it: Raffineria convertita in bioraffineria. Mantiene attività termiche residue.
sources.notes_en: Refinery converted to biorefinery. Maintains residual thermal activity.

sources.notes_it: Raffineria attiva con torcia di sicurezza permanente.
sources.notes_en: Active refinery with permanent safety flare.

sources.name_it: Ex stabilimento Fiat + porto industriale di Termini Imerese
sources.name_en: Former Fiat plant + Termini Imerese industrial port
sources.notes_it: Area industriale dismessa con attività portuali. Possibili attività termiche residue.
sources.notes_en: Decommissioned industrial area with active port. Possible residual thermal activity.

sources.name_it: Porto e area industriale di Catania
sources.notes_it: Attività portuali e raffinerie minori.
sources.notes_en: Port activity and small refineries.

vision_result.notes: Extensive greenhouse complexes visible as reflective rectangular structures interspersed with agricultural fields and scattered urban development. The greenhouses appear in clusters throughout the area, particularly concentrated in the upper left and lower portions of the image. These glass/plastic structures would generate significant heat signatures due to solar heating and climate control systems.

annotation.auto_notes: Extensive greenhouse complexes visible as reflective rectangular structures interspersed with agricultural fields and scattered urban development. The greenhouses appear in clusters throughout the area, particularly concentrated in the upper left and lower portions of the image. These glass/plastic structures would generate significant heat signatures due to solar heating and climate control systems.

vision_result.notes: Multiple large open-pit quarries visible in upper left and central portions of image, showing exposed rock faces and terraced excavation patterns. These quarries create heat anomalies due to exposed rock surfaces. Industrial facilities and residential areas visible in lower left and upper right portions.

annotation.auto_notes: Multiple large open-pit quarries visible in upper left and central portions of image, showing exposed rock faces and terraced excavation patterns. These quarries create heat anomalies due to exposed rock surfaces. Industrial facilities and residential areas visible in lower left and upper right portions.

vision_result.notes: Extensive greenhouse agriculture visible as white/reflective rectangular structures covering large portions of the area. The greenhouses are arranged in various orientations and sizes, interspersed with open agricultural fields. This type of intensive greenhouse farming is common in Sicily and would generate significant heat signatures from solar heating and climate control systems. The pattern is characteristic of commercial agricultural operations in the region.

annotation.auto_notes: Extensive greenhouse agriculture visible as white/reflective rectangular structures covering large portions of the area. The greenhouses are arranged in various orientations and sizes, interspersed with open agricultural fields. This type of intensive greenhouse farming is common in Sicily and would generate significant heat signatures from solar heating and climate control systems. The pattern is characteristic of commercial agricultural operations in the region.

vision_result.notes: Large open-pit extraction site with exposed light-colored rock/mineral surfaces in center of image. Multiple excavation benches visible with bare earth and disturbed ground. Access roads connect to the quarry. Surrounded by agricultural fields and forested areas. The exposed mineral surfaces would create heat anomalies in infrared sensors.

annotation.auto_notes: Large open-pit extraction site with exposed light-colored rock/mineral surfaces in center of image. Multiple excavation benches visible with bare earth and disturbed ground. Access roads connect to the quarry. Surrounded by agricultural fields and forested areas. The exposed mineral surfaces would create heat anomalies in infrared sensors.

vision_result.notes: Extensive greenhouse complex visible as reflective rectangular structures in teal/green color scattered across agricultural landscape. The greenhouses have characteristic geometric patterns and reflective surfaces typical of commercial agricultural operations in Sicily. These structures would generate heat signatures due to controlled climate conditions inside.

annotation.auto_notes: Extensive greenhouse complex visible as reflective rectangular structures in teal/green color scattered across agricultural landscape. The greenhouses have characteristic geometric patterns and reflective surfaces typical of commercial agricultural operations in Sicily. These structures would generate heat signatures due to controlled climate conditions inside.

vision_result.notes: Dense residential area with orange/terracotta roofs typical of Sicilian urban development. Multiple large green open spaces visible including parks and athletic fields. No industrial heat sources identified - likely urban heat island effect from dense housing causing IR anomaly.

annotation.auto_notes: Dense residential area with orange/terracotta roofs typical of Sicilian urban development. Multiple large green open spaces visible including parks and athletic fields. No industrial heat sources identified - likely urban heat island effect from dense housing causing IR anomaly.

vision_result.notes: Large open-pit excavation site visible in center of image with bare exposed rock/mineral surfaces and disturbed terrain. Multiple extraction levels visible. Surrounded by agricultural fields and forested areas. The exposed light-colored surfaces and ongoing extraction activity would generate significant heat anomalies visible to infrared sensors.

annotation.auto_notes: Large open-pit excavation site visible in center of image with bare exposed rock/mineral surfaces and disturbed terrain. Multiple extraction levels visible. Surrounded by agricultural fields and forested areas. The exposed light-colored surfaces and ongoing extraction activity would generate significant heat anomalies visible to infrared sensors.

vision_result.notes: Extensive area of greenhouse structures visible as reflective rectangular patterns across agricultural land. Multiple clusters of glasshouses spread across the region, typical of intensive Mediterranean agriculture. This type of infrastructure generates significant heat signatures due to solar heating and climate control systems.

annotation.auto_notes: Extensive area of greenhouse structures visible as reflective rectangular patterns across agricultural land. Multiple clusters of glasshouses spread across the region, typical of intensive Mediterranean agriculture. This type of infrastructure generates significant heat signatures due to solar heating and climate control systems.

vision_result.notes: Large concentrations of reflective rectangular greenhouse structures visible in multiple clusters throughout the image, particularly prominent in the center and lower portions. These glasshouses appear as bright white/reflective rectangular arrays interspersed with agricultural fields and some forested areas. The greenhouses would generate heat signatures due to solar heating and controlled climate operations.

annotation.auto_notes: Large concentrations of reflective rectangular greenhouse structures visible in multiple clusters throughout the image, particularly prominent in the center and lower portions. These glasshouses appear as bright white/reflective rectangular arrays interspersed with agricultural fields and some forested areas. The greenhouses would generate heat signatures due to solar heating and controlled climate operations.

vision_result.notes: Multiple large solar farms visible as regular rectangular arrays of photovoltaic panels, interspersed among agricultural fields. The solar installations show characteristic blue-tinted reflective panels in organized grid patterns. These would generate consistent infrared heat signatures during daylight hours, explaining the thermal anomaly detection.

annotation.auto_notes: Multiple large solar farms visible as regular rectangular arrays of photovoltaic panels, interspersed among agricultural fields. The solar installations show characteristic blue-tinted reflective panels in organized grid patterns. These would generate consistent infrared heat signatures during daylight hours, explaining the thermal anomaly detection.

sources.notes_it: Tunnel di polietilene ad alta riflessione MIR. Il rivestimento in plastica può presentare firma termica persistente, soprattutto al tramonto.
sources.notes_en: Polyethylene polytunnels. The plastic cover can present a persistent thermal signature, especially at sunset.

sources.notes_it: Area residenziale urbana. Isole di calore urbano possono essere confuse con piccoli incendi a basso FRP.
sources.notes_en: Urban residential area. Urban heat islands can be confused with low-FRP small fires.

sources.notes_it: Pannelli fotovoltaici. La superficie può presentare riflessi MIR che innescano falsi positivi quando l'angolo solare è basso.
sources.notes_en: Photovoltaic panels. The surface can present MIR reflections that trigger false positives at low solar angles.
